# pfsense_auth_server (Resource)

Manages a pfSense [authentication server](https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/usermanager/authservers.html) (LDAP or RADIUS). Auth servers are used to authenticate users against external directory services.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Manage a RADIUS authentication server
resource "pfsense_auth_server" "radius_example" {
  name             = "Corporate RADIUS"
  type             = "radius"
  host             = "203.0.113.10"
  radius_protocol  = "MSCHAPv2"
  radius_secret    = "shared-secret-here"
  radius_auth_port = "1812"
  radius_acct_port = "1813"
  radius_timeout   = "5"
  radius_srvcs     = "both"
}

# Manage an LDAP authentication server (Active Directory)
resource "pfsense_auth_server" "ldap_example" {
  name             = "Corporate AD"
  type             = "ldap"
  host             = "198.51.100.10"
  ldap_port        = "389"
  ldap_urltype     = "Standard TCP"
  ldap_protver     = "3"
  ldap_scope       = "subtree"
  ldap_basedn      = "DC=example,DC=com"
  ldap_authcn      = "CN=Users;OU=Staff"
  ldap_binddn      = "CN=svc-pfsense,OU=ServiceAccounts,DC=example,DC=com"
  ldap_bindpw      = "bind-password-here"
  ldap_timeout     = "25"
  ldap_attr_user   = "samAccountName"
  ldap_attr_group  = "cn"
  ldap_attr_member = "memberOf"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host` (String) Hostname or IP address of the authentication server.
- `name` (String) Descriptive name for the authentication server.
- `type` (String) Server type: 'ldap' or 'radius'.

### Optional

- `ldap_allow_unauthenticated` (Boolean) Allow unauthenticated bind.
- `ldap_attr_group` (String) LDAP group naming attribute (e.g. 'cn').
- `ldap_attr_groupobj` (String) LDAP group object class (default: 'posixGroup').
- `ldap_attr_member` (String) LDAP group member attribute (e.g. 'member', 'memberOf', 'uniqueMember').
- `ldap_attr_user` (String) LDAP user naming attribute (e.g. 'cn', 'samAccountName').
- `ldap_authcn` (String) LDAP authentication containers, semicolon-separated (e.g. 'CN=Users;OU=Staff').
- `ldap_basedn` (String) LDAP base DN for searches (e.g. 'DC=example,DC=com').
- `ldap_binddn` (String) LDAP bind DN for authenticated searches (leave empty for anonymous bind).
- `ldap_bindpw` (String, Sensitive) LDAP bind password. Sensitive/write-only for creates/updates.
- `ldap_caref` (String) CA reference ID for LDAP SSL/STARTTLS connections.
- `ldap_extended_enabled` (Boolean) Enable LDAP extended query.
- `ldap_extended_query` (String) LDAP extended query string (e.g. 'memberOf=CN=VPNUsers,OU=Groups,DC=example,DC=com').
- `ldap_nostrip_at` (Boolean) Do not strip '@' from usernames.
- `ldap_pam_groupdn` (String) LDAP group DN for shell authentication access.
- `ldap_port` (String) LDAP server port number (e.g. '389' for TCP/STARTTLS, '636' for SSL).
- `ldap_protver` (String) LDAP protocol version: '2' or '3'.
- `ldap_rfc2307` (Boolean) Use RFC 2307 style group lookups.
- `ldap_rfc2307_userdn` (Boolean) Use DN for username search in RFC 2307 mode.
- `ldap_scope` (String) LDAP search scope: 'one' (One Level) or 'subtree' (Entire Subtree).
- `ldap_timeout` (String) LDAP connection timeout in seconds (default: '25').
- `ldap_urltype` (String) LDAP transport type: 'Standard TCP', 'STARTTLS Encrypted', or 'SSL/TLS Encrypted'.
- `ldap_utf8` (Boolean) UTF8 encode LDAP parameters.
- `radius_acct_port` (String) RADIUS accounting port (default: '1813').
- `radius_auth_port` (String) RADIUS authentication port (default: '1812').
- `radius_nasip_attribute` (String) RADIUS NAS-IP-Address attribute (interface name or IP).
- `radius_protocol` (String) RADIUS authentication protocol: 'PAP', 'CHAP_MD5', 'MSCHAPv1', or 'MSCHAPv2'.
- `radius_secret` (String, Sensitive) RADIUS shared secret. Sensitive/write-only for creates/updates.
- `radius_srvcs` (String) RADIUS services: 'both', 'auth', or 'acct'.
- `radius_timeout` (String) RADIUS timeout in seconds (default: '5').

### Read-Only

- `refid` (String) Unique reference ID (auto-generated).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import pfsense_auth_server.example "server name"
```
